summary: A.L.E.X. v2.1 backend regression after making emergentintegrations import optional (try/except _HAS_LLM flag) and removing it from requirements.txt for Render self-hosting. All 25/25 pytest tests pass in 38s. Verified: import guard, AI still functional in dev (emergentintegrations present -> _HAS_LLM=True), 501 branch exists in /api/ai/analyze code path for production Render deploys, and full regression on non-AI endpoints (settings, monthly-entries, categories, debts, dashboard w/ allocation_targets, rebalance, goals, watchlist, backup export/import, migration).
passed: GET /api/ returns version 2.0, status ready (backend starts fine with optional LLM import)
emergentintegrations still importable in dev -> _HAS_LLM=True path exercised
POST /api/ai/analyze returns valid JSON (BUY/HOLD/SELL/WATCH) with Claude Sonnet 4.5
Code review: server.py lines 18-22 has try/except import with _HAS_LLM flag
Code review: /api/ai/analyze route (line 778) raises HTTPException 501 with Italian message when _HAS_LLM=False
Full regression on categories, debts, settings, monthly-entries, dashboard, rebalance, allocation_targets, goals, backup, migration
critical_code_review_comments: Optional LLM import pattern is clean: try/except at lines 18-22, flag check at line 778 before use of LlmChat. Zero regression on any endpoint.
501 Italian message is user-friendly and correctly redirects to 'Aggiungi manualmente' UI - good UX for self-hosted Render users without EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.
requirements.txt now truly minimal (7 deps) - safe for Render's dependency resolver.
server.py still ~848 lines - modularization remains a nice-to-have (carried over, not a regression).
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_* prefixed items; cleaned up in finally blocks.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Render deploy compatibility change verified defensively. To actually simulate the _HAS_LLM=False branch would require uninstalling emergentintegrations, which was explicitly out of scope. The code branch is correct by inspection: try/except catches ImportError, flag is checked before any LlmChat usage, and 501 with Italian message returns cleanly.
